title: Imperial Center Construction Contracts Division
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Imperial Center Construction Contracts Division''' was in charge of construction projects on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] during the reign of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. In [[3 ABY/Legends|3.5 ABY]] it was headed by [[Bentu Pall Tarlen]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (novel)|''Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire'' novel]] {{1st|in book}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 1996-05-XX -->''[[The Secrets of Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire]]''
*<!-- 1996-06-XX -->''[[Shadows of the Empire Sourcebook]]''
